description.ko: 고압 환경에서 생물 발광과 유체 역학이 어우러진, 심해 속 투명한 생명체들의 평화로운 춤.
description.en: A peaceful dance of transparent life in the deep sea, featuring bioluminescence and fluid dynamics in a high-pressure environment.

prompt: A cinematic, ultra-detailed shot of AQUA-5, titled 'The Abyssal Requiem.' A series of glowing modular spheres connected by reinforced glass tunnels submerged in the dark #000080 midnight zone. Surrounding the station are massive #40E0D0 bioluminescent jellyfish and glowing #48D1CC coral. The #006994 water is dark and pressurized with floating marine snow. High-tech lighting from the station illuminates the rugged ocean floor. 8k resolution, photorealistic, moody lighting, ethereal atmosphere.
